items.name: D-Day beach landings
items.extraction_note: Initial landings created the first information-pressure shock: mislandings, lost radios, and uncertain beachhead status.

items.name: Operation Cobra breakout
items.extraction_note: Weather delay and rhino modifications turned bocage attrition into maneuver warfare.

items.name: Operation Totalize
items.extraction_note: Night offensive with friendly-fire risk and armored pressure on Falaise approaches.

items.name: Carentan causeway attack
source: The Battle of Carentan (8-15 June): Utah Beach to Cherbourg
items.extraction_note: Command transmission failure and hedgerow/causeway terrain made the attack depend on artillery and local improvisation.

items.name: Operation Windsor
source: HQ 8 Cdn Inf Bde, Operation Windsor
items.extraction_note: Operational report source useful for staff-paper language and after-action extraction.
